languages.text: [Нахально ухмыльнуться] "Вы всю дорогу поучали меня — разве не оцените на прощание, как хорошо я усвоил ваши уроки бытия Вольным Торговцем?"
[Smirk arrogantly] "You have been teaching me how to be a Rogue Trader all this time — now at our parting, are you not impressed by how well I have absorbed your lessons?"
languages.original_text: [Нахально ухмыльнуться] "Вы всю дорогу поучали меня — разве не оцените на прощание, как хорошо я усвоил ваши уроки бытия Вольным Торговцем?"

traits.locale_text: [Smirk arrogantly] "You have been teaching me how to be a Rogue Trader all this time — now at our parting, are you not impressed by how well I have absorbed your lessons?"
[Smirk arrogantly] "You have been teaching me how to be a Rogue Trader all this time — now at our parting, are you not impressed by how well I have absorbed your lessons?"
[Smirk arrogantly] "You have been teaching me how to be a Rogue Trader all this time — now at our parting, are you not impressed by how well I have absorbed your lessons?"

languages.text: [Sonreír con arrogancia] «Lleva todo este tiempo enseñándome a ser Comerciante Independiente. Ahora que nos separamos, ¿no le impresiona lo bien que he asimilado sus lecciones?».
languages.original_text: [Smirk arrogantly] "You have been teaching me how to be a Rogue Trader all this time — now at our parting, are you not impressed by how well I have absorbed your lessons?"

traits.locale_text: [Sonreír con arrogancia] «Lleva todo este tiempo enseñándome a ser Comerciante Independiente. Ahora que nos separamos, ¿no le impresiona lo bien que he asimilado sus lecciones?».

languages.text: 【得意地冷笑】“这阵子你一直在教我怎么当行商浪人。如今要分别了，你难道不觉得，我学到了你的精髓吗？”
languages.original_text: [Smirk arrogantly] "You have been teaching me how to be a Rogue Trader all this time — now at our parting, are you not impressed by how well I have absorbed your lessons?"

traits.locale_text: 【得意地冷笑】“这阵子你一直在教我怎么当行商浪人。如今要分别了，你难道不觉得，我学到了你的精髓吗？”

languages.text: [Afficher un sourire arrogant] « C'est vous qui m'avez appris à me comporter comme {mf|un libre-marchand|une libre-marchande} digne de ce nom, et je pense avoir parfaitement retenu la leçon. N'êtes-vous pas impressionné ? »
languages.original_text: [Smirk arrogantly] "You have been teaching me how to be a Rogue Trader all this time — now at our parting, are you not impressed by how well I have absorbed your lessons?"

traits.locale_text: [Afficher un sourire arrogant] « C'est vous qui m'avez appris à me comporter comme {mf|un libre-marchand|une libre-marchande} digne de ce nom, et je pense avoir parfaitement retenu la leçon. N'êtes-vous pas impressionné ? »

languages.text: [Kibirle sırıt] "Bana bunca zaman nasıl Hür Tacir olunacağını öğrettin. Ayrılık vakti geldi, derslerini ne kadar iyi özümsediğimden etkilenmedin mi?"
languages.original_text: [Smirk arrogantly] "You have been teaching me how to be a Rogue Trader all this time — now at our parting, are you not impressed by how well I have absorbed your lessons?"

traits.locale_text: [Kibirle sırıt] "Bana bunca zaman nasıl Hür Tacir olunacağını öğrettin. Ayrılık vakti geldi, derslerini ne kadar iyi özümsediğimden etkilenmedin mi?"

languages.text: [Arrogant grinsen] "Ihr habt mich all die Zeit gelehrt, wie man ein Freihändler ist ... seid Ihr nun, da sich unsere Wege trennen, nicht beeindruckt, wie gut ich Eure Lektionen beherzigt habe?"
languages.original_text: [Smirk arrogantly] "You have been teaching me how to be a Rogue Trader all this time — now at our parting, are you not impressed by how well I have absorbed your lessons?"

traits.locale_text: [Arrogant grinsen] "Ihr habt mich all die Zeit gelehrt, wie man ein Freihändler ist ... seid Ihr nun, da sich unsere Wege trennen, nicht beeindruckt, wie gut ich Eure Lektionen beherzigt habe?"

languages.text: [鼻で笑う]「今までずっと、私をローグトレーダーにするための教えを授けてくれましたね。別れ際、私の吸収力の高さを感心しませんか？」
languages.original_text: [Smirk arrogantly] "You have been teaching me how to be a Rogue Trader all this time — now at our parting, are you not impressed by how well I have absorbed your lessons?"

traits.locale_text: [鼻で笑う]「今までずっと、私をローグトレーダーにするための教えを授けてくれましたね。別れ際、私の吸収力の高さを感心しませんか？」
